allow: PowerShell($cmds = @\("node","npm","npm.cmd","npx","corepack","pnpm","yarn","bun"\); foreach \($c in $cmds\) { $g = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { "$c -> $\($g.Source\)" } else { "$c -> \(not found\)" } })

PowerShell("=== PATH machine \(HKLM\) ==="; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\); ""; "=== PATH utilisateur \(HKCU\) ==="; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); ""; "=== where.exe node/npm \(cherche partout sur le PATH actuel\) ==="; & where.exe node 2>&1; & where.exe npm 2>&1; & where.exe npm.cmd 2>&1)
